arts.ttl: Graham Potter discusses Man Utd links amid renewed Erik ten Hag uncertainty
arts.sum: Graham Potter has admitted being involved in "conversations" after being rumoured to be a potential candidate to replace Erik ten Hag at Manchester United since the summer. He was rumoured to be one of the many candidates United spoke to when deciding where to go with Ten Hag's future, although Potter has now claimed that a lot of speculation is "untrue".

arts.ttl: Man Utd confirm outcome of Bruno Fernandes red card appeal
arts.sum: The Football Association have overturned the three-match ban handed out to Manchester United midfielder Bruno Fernandes after accepting the Red Devils' appeal of wrongful dismissal. "Bruno Fernandes will be available for Manchester United's next three games following a successful claim of wrongful dismissal," a club statement read.

arts.ttl: Man Utd recruitment under 'increasing scrutiny' from new hierarchy
arts.sum: Since the end of the summer transfer window, sporting director Dan Ashworth is described as performing a "deep dive" into how the club works and has already noticed "shortcomings in certain areas". Manchester United’s recruitment department is reported to be under "increasing scrutiny" as the club's new sporting hierarchy gets deeper into the job at hand.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand's six-word Man Utd response speaks volumes amid Erik ten Hag struggles
arts.sum: Rio Ferdinand was quick to try and move on from discussion about Manchester United's poor form while working as a pundit on TNT Sports' coverage of Manchester City's win over Slovan Bratislava

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag sack verdict delivered as Man United given clear instruction before Porto
arts.sum: Manchester United news as Erik ten Hag verdict delivered after the 3-0 defeat against Tottenham with the Dutchman under increased pressure over his position at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Papers: Ten Hag backed by senior players to turn Man Utd around
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Wednesday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Man Utd to replace best midfielder of the season with England star
arts.sum: The report states that Man Utd are ready to 'push out' Eriksen and replace him with Wharton, whose impressive performances since joining Crystal Palace in January earned him a place in England's squad for Euro 2024. Christian Eriksen, who has arguably been Man Utd's best midfielder so far this term despite his mistake against Twente, is even more likely to depart than the Brazilian as he is out of contract next year.

arts.ttl: Manchester United's forgotten youngster is making progress after suffering freak injury
arts.sum: Man Utd's U21s drew 1-1 against Hertha Berlin and Dan Gore captained the side as he stepped up his fitness

arts.ttl: David de Gea 'suffering' at new club after Manchester United exit
arts.sum: David de Gea has made five appearances for Fiorentina since joining the club on a one-year deal in August

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot aims thinly veiled dig at Man Utd after Tottenham humbling
arts.sum: Arne Slot has enjoyed a dream start to life at Liverpool after replacing Jurgen Klopp and the Dutchman already appears to be on board with the rivalry with Manchester United
